overall.description: First-person exploration of the Ravenclaw common room from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy). The player ascends a spiral staircase and explores the circular common room featuring blue and bronze decor, Gothic architecture, astronomical ceiling charts, and ornate furnishings before descending to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase with blue carpet runner

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stone staircase with ornate metal railing, approaching a statue at the landing

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with worn steps and decorative metal railing
dark blue carpet with gold trim running up the center of the stairs
grey stone block walls with Gothic architectural details
tall pointed-arch windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass
ornate black wrought iron railing with decorative scrollwork
stone statue of a robed figure holding a wand at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a curved stone spiral staircase. The camera moves steadily upward along a blue carpeted runner, passing Gothic windows that let in soft natural light. An ornate metal railing lines the left side, and a stone statue of a robed figure becomes visible at the landing ahead.

events.description: exits the spiral staircase into a circular room with a large eagle chandelier
passes through a large archway from stone floor to wooden floor into the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular antechamber and passing through the archway into the main common room

entered.detail: large ornate bronze chandelier shaped like an eagle with outstretched wings
round antechamber with domed ceiling and stone tile flooring
tall Gothic archway leading to the main common room
polished dark wooden floorboards of the main common room

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the staircase into a circular antechamber dominated by an elaborate eagle-shaped chandelier hanging from a domed ceiling. The space transitions from stone tile to polished wooden floors as the camera moves through a grand archway, entering the main common room area where natural light streams through tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room main hall with astronomical ceiling

events.description: camera looks down to reveal the large bronze Ravenclaw house seal embedded in the wooden floor
camera tilts upward to show the domed ceiling painted with an astronomical star chart

agents.ego_description: walking around the common room, examining the floor seal and ceiling, observing NPCs sitting by the fireplace and windows

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a green upholstered couch reading a book
figure standing near the grand fireplace in the center of the far wall

entered.detail: large circular bronze seal with eagle emblem and RAVENCLAW lettering set into the floor
tall ornate wooden fireplace with a fire burning and a portrait above the mantel
domed ceiling painted with constellations, stars, and astronomical diagrams in gold on blue
white wooden display cabinet filled with silver trophies and house shields
floor-to-ceiling pointed arch windows with diamond lattice panes letting in bright light
large wall mural of a silver eagle with spread wings against a dark blue background

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the spacious main common room, revealing the Ravenclaw house seal on the floor and an astronomical chart painted on the domed ceiling. The room features a grand fireplace, tall Gothic windows with blue curtains, and various study areas. Two NPCs are visible—one reading on a couch and another standing by the fireplace—while the camera passes a trophy cabinet and approaches a large eagle mural.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with bookshelves and descending staircase

events.description: leaves the main common room area and approaches the wooden staircase to descend
begins descending the wooden staircase to a lower level

agents.ego_description: walking past tall bookshelves and descending the wooden staircase toward a lower level of the castle

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling dark wood bookcases filled with leather-bound books
steep wooden staircase with carved railings leading downward
full suit of medieval armor holding a spear standing guard by the stairs
three framed portraits hanging on the stone wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the main common room area, passing tall bookshelves filled with volumes and a suit of armor standing guard. The player approaches and begins descending a wooden staircase, transitioning from the bright common room to a dimmer stairwell with stone walls and framed portraits, eventually revealing a wall sconce lighting the way down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a secluded stone staircase into a grand, light-filled common room before descending back into a dim corridor. It begins with a steady climb up a curved spiral staircase, following a blue carpeted runner past Gothic windows toward a stone statue at the landing. As the camera emerges from the stairs, the environment opens into a circular antechamber featuring an eagle-shaped chandelier, transitioning from stone tiles to polished wooden floors as it passes through a grand archway. The scene then expands into the main common room, where the camera glides past a house seal, a domed astronomical ceiling, and students relaxing by a grand fireplace before approaching a large eagle mural. Finally, the camera moves away from the bright study areas, passing towering bookshelves and a suit of armor before descending a wooden staircase into a dimmer stairwell lined with framed portraits and flickering wall sconces.
